title: PDPA Compliance
description: The Personal Data Protection Act 2012 governs the collection, use, and disclosure of personal data of Singapore residents. Organisations must designate a Data Protection Officer, implement a data protection policy, and respond to access and correction requests within 10 business days.
trigger: Collecting or processing personal data of Singapore residents

source.citation: Personal Data Protection Act 2012 (PDPA), s. 24; PDPA 2021 amendments

title: ACRA Business Registration
description: Foreign companies establishing a local business presence in Singapore must register with the Accounting and Corporate Regulatory Authority (ACRA). Options include a private limited company (Pte Ltd), branch office, or representative office, each with different compliance obligations.
trigger: Establishing local business presence in Singapore

source.citation: Companies Act 1967, s. 4; Business Names Registration Act 2014

title: Employment Pass for Foreign Professionals
description: Foreign professionals earning at least S$5,000 per month (S$5,500 for financial services) must obtain an Employment Pass from the Ministry of Manpower. Applications are assessed under the COMPASS framework considering salary, qualifications, and firm-level diversity.
trigger: Hiring foreign professionals earning above S$5,000/month

source.citation: Employment of Foreign Manpower Act (Cap. 91A); MOM EP Criteria

title: CPF Contributions
description: Employers must make Central Provident Fund (CPF) contributions for Singapore citizens and permanent residents. Employer contribution rates range from 17% for employees under 55. Contributions are remitted monthly through the CPF Board.
trigger: Hiring Singapore citizen or permanent resident employees
